title: [MTR] 500 Series Shinkansen
description: 500 Series Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the iconic 500 Series Shinkansen to the game.

It includes cabs, standard cars, green cars and pantograph cars.

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

Please enjoy it!

![500 Series Shinkansen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2806c85cc74e9ac3a97e587f8bdd30e49a47bbd7.jpeg)
